docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF BOHNEL, SUZANNE AS TO DEFENDANT WHERRY, JANET AN INDIVIDUAL DBA THE DISCOVERY CENTER SCHOOL JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
